member.name: T:SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Contracts.Requests.LoginRequest
member.summary: HTTP request contract for user login.

member.name: M:SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Contracts.Requests.LoginRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Guid)
member.summary: HTTP request contract for user login.

member.name: T:SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Contracts.Requests.RegisterRequest
member.summary: HTTP request contract for user registration. Validated by RegisterRequestValidator before reaching the handler.

member.name: M:SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Contracts.Requests.RegisterRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Guid)
member.summary: HTTP request contract for user registration. Validated by RegisterRequestValidator before reaching the handler.

member.name: T:SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles authentication endpoints for the Identity service. All endpoints are versioned under /api/v1/auth. Register and Login are public — no JWT required. All other endpoints require valid JWT.

member.name: M:SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Contracts.Requests.RegisterRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new user account. Returns the newly created user ID on success.

member.name: M:SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Contracts.Requests.LoginRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns JWT tokens.

member.name: T:SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Controllers.UsersController
member.summary: Handles user management endpoints for the Identity service. All endpoints require valid JWT authentication.

member.name: M:SpectrumCare.Identity.API.Controllers.UsersController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a user by their unique identifier.
